evidence.quote: The total cost for the project is $494,408.
The new system reduces the footprint of the technology and simplifies the troubleshooting and replacement process should future issues arise.

uncertainties: The new system will provide integrated audio capabilities, but it is unclear what specific audio features will be included.
recommended_next_queries: What specific audio features will be included in the new system?
